text:
achieve success in his educational
career. His character will be governed
Db.· by moral law (Dharma). He will be
learned in Vedas and Medicine. His
Sat. Moon education will last upto 23-24 years.
Jup. He will get married in his 24th year. In
the case of a female native the partner
will be one employed in a financial and commercial concern on a high level.
He will earn fame, and live a respectable life of comfort. The native's father
will be interested in concerns dealing with chemicals. The Sun and Venus are
conjunct, with Mercury in the adjoining house. Rahu in the 3rd and the Moon
in the 4th from the Sun. This shows the father dealing in intoxicants. Jupiter
and Saturn in the 7th from the Sun show his profession as a pharmaceutical
concern.
This native has Angaraka Dosha (Mars in Aries). This will delay

IMPORTANT CHARTS 53
marital happiness. Things will get better from 25th year-upto 63rd year. He
will have 2 daughters and one son, who will bring happiness to him.
CHART69
